zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief於1296年出生在英國蘇格蘭Comhairle nan Eilean Siar斯托諾維艾時，他的父親Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris46歲，母親Christina Fraser of Lovat27歲。他於1330年之前與Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1380年在蘇格蘭洛-爾斯托諾維艾享年84歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief于1296年出生在英国苏格兰Comhairle nan Eilean Siar斯托諾維艾时，他的父亲Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris46岁，母亲Christina Fraser of Lovat27岁。他于1330年之前与Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1380年在苏格兰洛-爾斯托諾維艾享年84岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易納。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief was born in 1296, in Stornoway, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris, was 46 and his mother, Christina Fraser of Lovat, was 27. He married Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell before 1330, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1380, in Stornoway, Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 84, and was buried in Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief est né en 1296, à Stornoway, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Christina Fraser of Lovat, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell avant 1330, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1380, à Stornoway, Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief 1296 in Stornoway, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris 46 und seine Mutter Christina Fraser of Lovat 27. Er hat vor 1330 in Scotland Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1380 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Stornoway, Ross-shire, Scotland und wurde in Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief(이)가 1296년 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 스톤웨이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina Fraser of Lovat(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1330년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1380년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 스톤웨이에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief nasceu em 1296, em Stornoway, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Christina Fraser of Lovat, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell antes 1330, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1380, em Stornoway, Ross-shire, Scotland, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.Castle Stornoway, Lewis Island, Western: сторноуеи, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief родился в 1296 г. в местности сторноуеи, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina Fraser of Lovat, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell перед 1330 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1380 г. в местности сторноуеи, росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности иона, аргилл, Шотландия.

Se casó con Lady Dorothea Marjorie Campbell antes de 1330, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1380, en Stornoway, Ross-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Iona, Argyll, Scotland.
